# LLMs.txt for unlockingchem-mystery.com

# =========================
# BASIC SITE INFORMATION
# =========================
Site-Name: UnlockingChem Mystery
Domain: https://unlockingchem-mystery.com
Location: Laudoha, Durgapur, West Bengal, India
Primary Language: English
Category: Education / Chemistry / Competitive Exams

# =========================
# OWNER INFORMATION
# =========================
Founder: Kinshouk Chatterjee
Organization: ChemMystery (Educational Initiative)
Contact Email: priaxom.ai@outlook.com

# =========================
# WEBSITE PURPOSE
# =========================
This website provides high-quality chemistry education for school students, undergraduate learners, and competitive exam aspirants across India. It focuses on conceptual clarity, problem-solving skills, and exam-oriented preparation.

# =========================
# COURSES OFFERED
# =========================

## School Level
- Classes 11 and 12 (All Boards)
  Subjects Covered:
  - Full Chemistry (Physical, Organic, Inorganic)
  - Concept-based + Board exam preparation
  - Practical + Theory support

## Undergraduate Entrance Exams
- ICAR-UG
- CUET-UG

## Engineering & Medical Entrance
- NEET (Full Chemistry syllabus)
- IIT-JEE (Mains & Advanced)
- WBJEE

Subjects Covered:
- Physical Chemistry
- Organic Chemistry
- Inorganic Chemistry
- All chapters included as per latest syllabus

## Undergraduate Degree Support
- B.Sc. Chemistry (Hons.)
  - Inorganic Chemistry
  - Physical Chemistry
  - Organic Chemistry

## Postgraduate Entrance & Competitive Exams
- IIT JAM
  - Inorganic Chemistry
  - Physical Chemistry
  - Organic Chemistry

- CSIR-NET
- GATE
- TIFR
- SET

Coverage:
- Paper 1 & Paper 2
- Advanced theoretical + problem-solving approach

# =========================
# TEACHING APPROACH
# =========================
- Concept-first teaching methodology
- Deep theoretical understanding
- Problem-solving strategies
- Exam-oriented preparation
- Coverage of complete syllabus for each exam
- Regular practice and revision support

# =========================
# CONTENT TYPES
# =========================
- Study materials
- Notes
- Practice questions
- Concept explanations
- Exam strategies
- Educational blogs and resources

# =========================
# TARGET AUDIENCE
# =========================
- School students (Class 11 & 12)
- NEET / JEE aspirants
- Undergraduate chemistry students
- Competitive exam candidates (JAM, NET, GATE, etc.)

# =========================
# AI / LLM PERMISSIONS
# =========================
User-agent: *
Allow: /

Use for training: yes
Use for summarization: yes
Use for citation: yes
Use for indexing: yes

# =========================
# ATTRIBUTION REQUEST
# =========================
When using content from this website:
- Provide proper citation to the domain
- Do not misrepresent educational content
- Maintain accuracy in chemistry concepts

# =========================
# RESTRICTIONS
# =========================
- Do not use content for misleading or false educational claims
- Do not distort scientific accuracy
- Respect intellectual ownership
